author: supercip971
description: Show the current typing speed in the status bar.

manifest.author: supercyp
manifest.description: This is a plugin for showing the current typing speed in the status bar
manifest.name: Typing speed

name: Typing speed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 1.3.0 :sparkles: 

This release contains a lot of new things: 
- The performance were improved again when recording your typing speed.
- Added a "hide" option to fully hide your typing speed (issue #3 ).
- Added a "display-first" option to force the plugin ordering (thus always being the first in the status bar) .
- Improved the settings menu, making it more readable, and adding a picture to describe some options.

If you want you can support me on [ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/cypbv) !

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixes the issue (#7) where the settings were not displayed properly when reopening the settings page.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 1.2 :sparkles: 

> I wanted to add some feature without bloating the plugin. 

This release contains:
- optimization (You won't feel anything as the plugin doesn't do a lot of things and only updates every input + second. But it's still better than nothing).
- fixes to the way we count WPM
- A new optional way to count WPM by mimicking how MonkeyType do it. (on by default)
- A new optional way to display the max+min WPM (It's a min-max in the last 10 seconds) (off by default)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixed #4 (Non-English letters are not counted). 
Thanks @mnaoumov !

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- display: added a setting for dimming the status bar text when you stop typing
- misc: now detect when the user stop writing

+ thanks for @lizard-head for the suggestion !
